claims.summary: Verify mode packing, porosity, pressure source, admission state, and distinguishability remain separately visible instead of collapsing into stable_habitable.
Compare current state with a non-live mirrored porosity-increase candidate and measure mode-packing pressure without applying control.
Trace lambda4-plus tail vibrancy during an open high-entropy gate using read-only telemetry.
Any entropy/orientation-conditioned semantic burst, projection bias, or admission widening remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
